title: cerastium arvense subsp. strictum
intro: Cerastium arvense subsp. strictum, also known as strict chickweed, is a subspecies of the Cerastium arvense plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of strict chickweed include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and even help with digestive problems. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in topical creams and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
